name: Axe Dragonute
description: If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
description: "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" + "Blue-Eyes White Dragon"

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

name: Dark Magician Girl
description: Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in the GYs.

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
description: A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.

name: Luster Dragon #2
description: This dragon feeds on emerald. Enchanted by this monster even when attacked, few people live to tell of its beauty.

name: Luster Dragon
description: A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.

name: Magic Cylinder
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.

name: Magician of Faith
description: FLIP: Target 1 Spell in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Magician's Circle
description: When a Spellcaster monster declares an attack: Each player Special Summons 1 Spellcaster monster with 2000 or less ATK from their Deck in Attack Position.

name: Magician's Valkyria
description: Your opponent cannot select another Spellcaster monster on the field as an attack target.

name: Marauding Captain
description: Your opponent cannot target face-up Warrior monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your hand.

name: Masked Dragon
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Dragon monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck.

name: Mystic Tomato
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 DARK monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position.

name: Mystical Elf
description: A delicate elf that lacks offense, but has a terrific defense backed by mystical power.

name: Ominous Fortunetelling
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Guess 1 card type (Monster, Spell, or Trap) in your opponent's hand. Your opponent shows you their hand, and if you guessed right, inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: One Day of Peace
description: Each player draws 1 card, and neither player takes damage until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Paladin of White Dragon
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with "White Dragon Ritual". At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: Destroy that face-down monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, but it cannot attack this turn.

name: Polymerization
description: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Reinforcement of the Army
description: Add 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior monster from your Deck to your hand.

name: Relieve Monster
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 monster you control; return that target to the hand, then Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster from your hand.

name: Remove Trap
description: Target 1 face-up Trap Card on the field; destroy that target.

name: Sabersaurus
description: This gentle dinosaur is a favorite of children. It loves to eat grass and peacefully live in the plains.

name: Sakuretsu Armor
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; destroy that target.

name: Sangan
description: If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand, but you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with that name for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Sangan" once per turn.

name: Seven Tools of the Bandit
description: When a Trap Card is activated: Pay 1000 LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Sogen
description: All Warrior and Beast-Warrior monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF.

name: Solemn Wishes
description: Each time you draw a card(s): Gain 500 LP.

name: Spear Dragon
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, change it to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Spellbinding Circle
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack or change its battle position. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Stamping Destruction
description: If you control a Dragon-Type monster: Target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to its controller.

name: Stop Defense
description: Target 1 Defense Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Attack Position.

name: Stray Lambs
description: Special Summon 2 "Lamb Tokens" (Beast-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. You cannot Summon other monsters the turn you activate this card (but you can Set).

name: Summoned Skull
description: A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

name: Swords of Revealing Light
description: After this card's activation, it remains on the field, but destroy it during the End Phase of your opponent's 3rd turn. When this card is activated: If your opponent controls face-down monsters, flip all of them face-up. While this card is face-up on the field, your opponent's monsters cannot declare an attack.

name: The Tricky
description: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 card.

name: The Warrior Returning Alive
description: Target 1 Warrior monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: The White Stone of Legend
description: If this card is sent to the GY: Add 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Thunder Dragon
description: You can discard this card; add up to 2 "Thunder Dragons" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Trap Eater
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 face-up Trap your opponent controls to the GY.

name: Twin-Headed Behemoth
description: If this card is destroyed and sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon this card during the End Phase, but its ATK/DEF become 1000, and you can only use this effect of "Twin-Headed Behemoth" once per Duel.

name: Twin-Headed Thunder Dragon
description: "Thunder Dragon" + "Thunder Dragon"

name: Twister
description: Pay 500 LP, then target 1 face-up Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

name: Tyrant Wing
description: Target 1 Dragon monster on the field; equip this card to it. It gains 400 ATK/DEF, also it can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if the monster equipped with this card by this effect attacked an opponent's monster this turn: Destroy this card.

name: Vengeful Bog Spirit
description: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned.

name: Viser Des
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation, destroy that target. While that target is face-up on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle.

name: Waboku
description: You take no battle damage this turn. Your monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

name: Warrior Lady of the Wasteland
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 EARTH Warrior monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in Attack Position.

name: Wasteland
description: All Dinosaur, Zombie, and Rock monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF.

name: White Dragon Ritual
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Paladin of White Dragon". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 4 or more.

name: Witch of the Black Forest
description: If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand, but you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with that name for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Witch of the Black Forest" once per turn.

name: Yami
description: All Fiend and Spellcaster monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF, also all Fairy monsters on the field lose 200 ATK/DEF.

name: Zombyra the Dark
description: This card cannot attack your opponent directly. If this card destroys a monster by battle: This card loses 200 ATK.

name: 7 Colored Fish
description: A rare rainbow fish that has never been caught by mortal man.

name: A Legendary Ocean
description: (This card's name is always treated as "Umi".) All WATER monsters gain 200 ATK/DEF. Reduce the Level of all WATER monsters in both players' hands and on the field by 1.

name: Abyss Soldier
description: Once per turn: You can discard 1 WATER monster to the Graveyard, then target 1 card on the field; return that target to the hand.

name: Abyss Warrior
description: You can discard 1 WATER monster to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; place that target on the top of the Deck.

name: Amphibious Bugroth MK-3
description: As long as "Umi" is face-up on the field, this card can attack your opponent directly.

name: Aqua Madoor
description: A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.

name: Bitelon
description: During battle between this attacking card and a Defense Position monster whose DEF is lower than the ATK of this card, inflict the difference as Battle Damage to your opponent.

name: Cure Mermaid
description: As long as this card remains face-up on the field, increase your Life Points by 800 during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Granadora
description: When this monster is Normal Summoned, Flip Summoned or Special Summoned, increase your Life Points by 1000 points. When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you take 2000 points of damage.

name: Mermaid Knight
description: While "Umi" is face-up on the field, this card can attack twice during the same Battle Phase.

name: Mother Grizzly
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 WATER monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.

name: Revival Jam
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: During your next Standby Phase, you can pay 1000 LP; Special Summon this card in Attack Position.

name: Terrorking Salmon
description: A feared salmon, master of the Sea of Darkness. Its roe is the best delicacy in the World of Darkness.

name: Umi
description: Increase the ATK and DEF of all Fish, Sea Serpent, Thunder, and Aqua-Type monsters by 200 points. Decrease the ATK and DEF of all Machine and Pyro-Type monsters by 200 points.

name: Warrior of Atlantis
description: You can discard this card to add 1 'Umi' from your Deck to your hand.

name: Wetlands
description: All Level 2 or lower Aqua-Type monsters you control gain 1200 ATK.

name: Premature Burial
description: Activate this card by paying 800 LP, then target 1 monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Attack Position and equip it with this card. When this card is destroyed, destroy the equipped monster.

name: Monster Reincarnation
description: Discard 1 card, then target 1 monster in your GY; add it to your hand.

name: Legendary Sword
description: Equip only to a Warrior monster. It gains 300 ATK/DEF.

name: UFO Turtle
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 FIRE monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in Attack Position.

name: Reinforcements
description: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 500 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: The Eye of Timaeus
description:
(This card is also always treated as "Legendary Dragon Timaeus".)
Target 1 "Dark Magician" monster you control; Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck that lists that monster on the field as Fusion Material, using it as the Fusion Material. You can only activate 1 "The Eye of Timaeus" per turn.

name: Spiritualism
description: Return 1 Spell/Trap Card your opponent controls to the hand. This card's activation and effect cannot be negated.

name: Blue Flame Swordsman
description: Once per turn, during either player's Battle Phase: You can target 1 other Warrior-Type monster you control; this card loses exactly 600 ATK, and if it does, that monster gains 600 ATK. When this card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (by battle or card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 FIRE Warrior-Type monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target.

name: Scapegoat
description: Special Summon 4 "Sheep Tokens" (Beast/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. They cannot be Tributed for a Tribute Summon. You cannot Summon other monsters the turn you activate this card (but you can Normal Set).

name: Shining Angel
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 LIGHT monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position.

name: Fusion Sage
description: Add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Flying Kamakiri #1
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 WIND monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in face-up Attack Position.

name: Chaos Necromancer
description: The ATK of this card is the number of Monster Cards in your Graveyard x 300.

name: An Owl of Luck
description: FLIP: Select 1 Field Spell Card from your Deck and place it on top of your Deck. If "Necrovalley" is on the field, you can add the selected Field Spell Card to your hand instead.

name: Dancing Fairy
description: As long as this card remains in face-up Defense Position on your side of the field, increase your Life Points by 1000 points during each of your Standby Phases.

name: Cave Dragon
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned while you control a monster. This card cannot declare an attack unless you control another Dragon-Type monster.

name: Dekoichi the Battlechanted Locomotive
description: FLIP: Draw 1 card, then draw 1 additional card for each face-up "Bokoichi the Freightening Car" you control.

name: Double Coston
description: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a DARK monster.

name: The Trojan Horse
description: When Tribute Summoning an EARTH monster, you can treat this 1 monster as 2 Tributes.

name: Archfiend of Gilfer
description: When this card is sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; equip that target with this card. That monster loses 500 ATK while equipped with this card.

name: Valkyrion the Magna Warrior
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" from your hand and/or field. You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" in your Graveyard; Special Summon them.

name: Airknight Parshath
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Draw 1 card.

name: Des Feral Imp
description: FLIP: Target 1 card in your Graveyard; shuffle that target into the Deck.

name: Spear Cretin
description: FLIP: When this card is sent to the Graveyard after being flipped, each player selects 1 monster from their Graveyard, and Special Summons it in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position.

name: Jar of Avarice
description: Target 5 cards in your GY, except "Jar of Avarice"; shuffle all 5 into the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Jar of Avarice" per turn.

name: Swords of Concealing Light
description: Destroy this card during your 2nd Standby Phase after activation. When this card resolves, change all monsters your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position. Monsters your opponent controls cannot change their battle positions.

name: Mirror Force
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Destroy all your opponent's Attack Position monsters.

name: Ring of Destruction
description: During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls whose ATK is less than or equal to their LP; destroy that face-up monster, and if you do, take damage equal to its original ATK, then inflict damage to your opponent, equal to the damage you took.

name: Enemy Controller
description:
Activate 1 of these effects.
● Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change that target's battle position.
● Tribute 1 monster, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; take control of that target until the End Phase.

name: Book of Moon
description: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; change that target to face-down Defense Position.

name: Mystical Space Typhoon
description: Target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

name: Giant Trunade
description: Return all Spell and Trap Cards on the field to the hand.

name: Brain Control
description: Pay 800 LP, then target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls that can be Normal Summoned/Set; take control of that target until the End Phase.

name: Threatening Roar
description: Your opponent cannot declare an attack this turn.

name: Rush Recklessly
description: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 700 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: Black Pendant
description: The equipped monster gains 500 ATK. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Trap Hole
description: When your opponent Normal or Flip Summons 1 monster with 1000 or more ATK: Target that monster; destroy that target.

name: Bottomless Trap Hole
description: When your opponent Summons a monster(s) with 1500 or more ATK: Destroy that monster(s) with 1500 or more ATK, and if you do, banish it.

name: Dust Tornado
description: Target 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target, then you can Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand.
